steps.title: Graph the solution region
steps.content: Use Desmos to graph both inequalities, $y\le x$ and $y\le -x$, then plot the answer choices. The solution region is the overlap below both boundary lines.

steps.title: Test every choice
steps.content:
• A. $(1, 0)$: $0 \leq 1$ ✓ but $0 \leq -1$ ✗; fails.
  • B. $(-1, 0)$: $0 \leq -1$ ✗; fails.
  • C. $(0, 1)$: $1 \leq 0$ ✗; fails.
  • D. $(0, -1)$: $-1 \leq 0$ ✓ and $-1 \leq 0$ ✓; satisfies both.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
